ValidationRule.description: The Expense Card can not be changed when validated.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND( $User.PS480FunctionValidationRulesActive__c =true,
NOT($User.IsProjectManager__c), NOT($User.PS180RoleFinanceApprover__c ) , OR( ExpenseValidatedFinance__c =true , ExpenseValidatedProjectResponsible__c =true ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You are not allowed to make changes to validated expense cards. (EC012)
